英文例句: Driving after drinking is reckless behaviour.

中文釋義: 佔優勢, 戰勝, 流行, 普及
英文例句: He prevailed against all odds to win a seat in parliament. / As long as the people insist on not using condoms, AIDS will continue to prevail.

中文釋義: 疏忽的, 大意的
英文例句: The doctor was sued for his negligent behaviour in failing to inform his patient of the test results.

中文釋義: 習慣性地
英文例句: He smokes habitually. He lights up on the hour.

中文釋義: 每天的, 日常的
英文例句: My day-to-day schedule consists of school in the morning, a part-time job in the afternoon and studying in the evening.

中文釋義: 了不起的, 傑出的, 特別有趣而引人注目的
英文例句: The event yesterday was remarkable because it was the first time that Jews and Protestants in Carlsburg sponsored an event together.

中文釋義: 激進的, 極端的
英文例句: My professor's ideology is very radical. He believes in socialism so strongly that I wonder sometimes if he is actually a communist.

中文釋義: 實際的, 現實的
英文例句: The expectations that you have for me are simply not realistic. There is no way that I can fulfil them.

中文釋義: 狂亂的, 動盪不安的
英文例句: Due to the turbulent social and political climate in South Africa, hospitals in the poorer townships are being flooded with victims of violence.

中文釋義: 無法取代的
英文例句: Nurse Sloane knows so much about our clinic that she is irreplaceable. We'll have to give her a pay raise so she doesn't leave.

中文釋義: 突破, 重大進展
英文例句: The discovery of the antibiotic properties of penicillin was a breakthrough for medicine, enabling a whole new realm of possibilities.

中文釋義: 應用的, 實用的
英文例句: After completing his MA in Applied Linguistics, he went overseas to forge ahead with his career in the ELT (English Language Teaching) industry.

中文釋義: 設想, 可預見
英文例句: Due to the increased incidence of serious flu this year, it's envisaged that free flu shots will be provided to the general public next year.

中文釋義: 融入的, 整合的
英文例句: The basic component of microelectronics is integrated circuits.

中文釋義: 可選擇的方式, 替代方案
英文例句: We must consider every possible alternative before making this decision.

中文釋義: (體積、數量或程度上) 極大的, 巨大的
英文例句: The benefits of moving our factories from the United Kingdom to China are tremendous.

中文釋義: 挖苦的, 嘲諷的, 憤世嫉俗的
英文例句: He is always so cynical about every suggestion that I make. It makes me not want to work for him anymore.

中文釋義: 沿著, 靠著, 在...旁邊
英文例句: After my coworkers came alongside me with this plan, everything went much more smoothly.

中文釋義: 不令人感到意外地, 不足為奇地
英文例句: Unsurprisingly, after the patient took more herbal medicine, his cold became much better.

中文釋義: 不變地, 恆久地
英文例句: This solution will not fix the problem permanently. It will only provide a temporary solution.

中文釋義: 強化, 支持, 加強
英文例句: The fact that English is becoming a more common language reinforces my argument that the world is increasingly becoming more connected.

中文釋義: 改善 (較細微的事物), 使優雅, 使純淨
英文例句: Her time with her grandparents in England refined her manners considerably.

中文釋義: 代表
英文例句: Can you ask him a favour on my behalf?
相關片語或備註: on sb's behalf 代表某人

中文釋義: 補充的
英文例句: My math level is not high enough to enter college so I need to go to a private school to receive supplementary education.

中文釋義: 初步的, 開端的
英文例句: Before we can begin this class, I have a few preliminary matters to talk about.

中文釋義: 願意 (幫忙或提供訊息) 的, 即將到來的
英文例句: Peace between Palestinians and Israelis will be easier to attain if both sides are forthcoming about their needs, intentions and goals.

中文釋義: 持續的, 堅持的
英文例句: I would have never woken up if not for the persistent ringing of my alarm clock.
